global.description: The ad features a combination of abstract shapes and text elements promoting a service.
global.main_message: Encourages users to save money with a free trial.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: Background shape
elements.description: A large, abstract shape in the center with a soft gradient.

elements.label: Overlay shape
elements.description: A slightly smaller, rounded rectangle overlaying the background shape.

elements.label: Circular element
elements.description: A medium-sized circular element positioned centrally, with a soft edge.

elements.label: Overlay rectangle
elements.description: A rectangular shape overlaying the background, slightly transparent.

elements.label: Secondary overlay
elements.description: A smaller rectangle positioned centrally, with a subtle shadow.

elements.label: Small circular element
elements.description: A small circular shape, similar to the larger one but less prominent.

elements.label: Additional overlay
elements.description: Another rectangular overlay, positioned centrally with a slight tilt.

elements.label: Small background shape
elements.description: A small, rounded shape in the center, blending with the background.

elements.label: Central rectangle
elements.description: A central rectangle with a soft edge, slightly transparent.

elements.label: Bottom element
elements.description: A tall, narrow shape at the bottom of the ad.

elements.label: Narrow vertical element
elements.description: A narrow vertical shape positioned towards the bottom right.

elements.label: Small vertical shape
elements.description: A small vertical shape at the bottom left, blending with the background.

elements.label: Main message
elements.description: A bold, white text stating 'Save with confidence Try for free' prominently displayed.
elements.text_content: Save with confidence Try for free

elements.label: Brand logo
elements.description: A small logo at the top left corner, featuring the text 'CoinBridge'.

elements.label: Sale badge
elements.description: A small, bright badge at the top right corner with the text 'SALE'.

elements.label: User-generated content tag
elements.description: A small tag at the top left corner labeled 'UGC'.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, native, minimalist with bold text, main message about saving money.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is centrally positioned, with the logo and discount badge at the top corners.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Save with confidence, Try for free, CoinBridge, SALE, UGC
